SpringFirst/pom.xml.general_idea: Added Maven build configuration to explicitly include XML files from src/main/resources.

SpringFirst/src/main/resources/spring.xm.general_idea: Restructured Spring bean definitions to use explicit property references and improved indentation.
SpringFirst/src/main/resources/spring.xm.before:
<bean id="Ferrari" class="ConstructorInjection.Ferrari" autowire="byType" >
<constructor-arg value="10"/>
<constructor-arg value="50"/>
</bean>

<bean id="Engine" class ="ConstructorInjection.Engine">
	<property name="milage" value="250"></property>

</bean>
SpringFirst/src/main/resources/spring.xm.after:
<!-- Constructor Injection for Ferrari -->
    <bean id="Ferrari" class="ConstructorInjection.Ferrari">
        <constructor-arg value="10"/>
        <constructor-arg value="50"/>
        <property name="e" ref="Engine"/>
    </bean>

    <!-- Engine Bean -->
    <bean id="Engine" class="ConstructorInjection.Engine">
        <property name="milage" value="250"/>
    </bean>
